The seven acceptance clauses map directly to the closed DAG design, implementation, and Spec.
Guarded Run replay demonstrates registry execution, journaling, HEAD rebinding, and final state behavior.
Closed registry, typed results, authoritative HEAD, profile separation, and fail-closed invariants align across docs, code, and tests.
Orchestrator, composition root, existing owners, and deferred production connectors have explicit coherent boundaries.
Forged input, unknown profile or action, missing runner, policy denial, HEAD spoof, and terminal stops are tested safely.
Current-HEAD unit, integration, E2E, typecheck, and version-stamp evidence is present.
Legacy behavior is compatible while CLI options, invalid input rejection, and disable fallback are tested.
The change is one autonomous DAG composition-port contract; production connectors and later closure are separate child Stories.
Controller input, state delta bounds, and forbidden raw context are validated and rejected safely.
Missing or unavailable owners cannot fabricate success and stop with a typed runtime state.
final_prepare is restricted to current-HEAD Gate SSOT and journals bounded evidence references.
Terminal transitions, resume cursor, HEAD rebinding, and idempotency are covered by contract and replay tests.
The Story intent is realized by the closed DAG and guarded pr_ready target without broadening merge or waiver authority.
Current runtime paths were inspected through focused workflow replay and persisted Run and Portfolio behavior at final HEAD.
Closed action types, authoritative HEAD, owner validation, typed stops, and one Story per Run are enforced in code and tests.
Merge, waiver, deploy, arbitrary shell, and production connector effects remain outside the autonomous action boundary.
Malformed state, unknown owner, dependency denial, provider absence, lock contention, and stale HEAD paths are explicitly tested fail closed.
Final-head focused tests, typecheck, build stamp, traceability, and independent reviews provide direct completion evidence.
CLI profile and disable fallback are additive while legacy behavior and closed typed output remain compatible.
The diff is one coherent autonomous DAG closure with explicit deferred connector boundary and linked roadmap context.
Malformed JSON and unsupported persisted state are rejected with typed failures rather than normalized silently.
Missing runner or provider produces a typed stop and cannot advance the DAG or report pr_ready.
Final prepare remains the authority and evidence or review lifecycle regressions cannot manufacture pr_ready.
State transitions, resume suffix, terminal handling, and lock recovery are validated against stale or over-green states.
